metadata.name: DataBinding
metadata.description: Essay: why @{variable} is not a template expression but a typed binding to a ViewModel field. Four H2 sections covering the syntax, type-checking, one-way flow, and the 'no logic in layout' rule. ~4-min read.

uiVariables.name: nextReadLinks
uiVariables.description: Two follow-up essays at the bottom.

dataFlow.diagram:
flowchart TD
    VIEW[DataBindingView] --> VM[DataBindingViewModel]
    VM -- nextReadLinks --> VIEW

methods.name: onAppear
methods.description: Seed nextReadLinks from the module-scope NEXT_READ_ENTRIES catalog (two rows: next_why_spec_first -> /concepts/why-spec-first, next_viewmodel -> /concepts/viewmodel-owned-state) and stamp currentLanguage from StringManager.language. Each row's titleKey / descriptionKey is resolved through StringManager with the concepts_data_binding_ namespace prefix, so the strings.json keys loaded are concepts_data_binding_next_why_spec_first_title / _description and concepts_data_binding_next_viewmodel_title / _description.

methods.name: onNavigate
methods.description: Client-side navigation via router.push(url). Destinations are the spec-mapped concept URLs enumerated in transitions: /concepts, /concepts/viewmodel-owned-state, /concepts/why-spec-first.

vars.name: nextReadLinks
vars.description: Two closing 'read next' cards pointing at /concepts/why-spec-first and /concepts/viewmodel-owned-state. Seeded by onAppear from the NEXT_READ_ENTRIES static catalog and re-seeded by onToggleLanguage.

transitions.condition: url is a spec-mapped concept URL or /concepts

notes: Second live essay under Concepts. Flipping CONCEPTS_ENTRIES row 4 (data-binding) from 'upcoming' to 'live' in HomeViewModel is the last step.
One short CodeBlock illustrates the valid binding forms side-by-side with an example of what is NOT allowed (no ternary, no method calls).
The closing next-reads point at WhySpecFirst (back) and ViewModel-owned state (upcoming sibling).
